movie

CINECAST

System Architecture v2.4.0

Precision Recommendation Engine

Discover how CINECAST decodes cinematic DNA to find your next favorite film through advanced vector semantics and mathematical similarity.

SOURCE
N=824,103 database

The Dataset (TMDB)

Our engine indexes over 800,000 titles from The Movie Database. We ingest rich metadata including plot synopses, cast dynamics, and nuanced genre tags.

architecture
tfidf(t,d,D)

Vectorization (TF-IDF)

We transform movie descriptions into high-dimensional numerical vectors using frequency-inverse document scaling.

w = tf × log(N/df)
compare_arrows
cos(θ) = A·B / ||A||||B||

Cosine Similarity

By calculating the angular distance between vectors, we identify movies that share structural "DNA".

LATENT SPACE [Z]
THE RESULT

Smarter Curation

No more scrolling through endless lists. Cinecast analyzes your input and calculates real-time similarity scores to present a curated gallery of high-fidelity matches tailored to your specific mood.

Processing Latency ~12.4ms per query 
Σ(AiBi)
-------
√ΣAi²√ΣBi²
